summary: Completed comprehensive testing of /api/v1/* API migration. All 25 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed - WebSocket at /api/v1/ws connects, Live badge shows, navigation works, search works, Compose dialog works.

issues: Console warning: 'In HTML, <span> cannot be a child of <option>' - minor hydration warning from select options rendering, does not affect functionality

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/v1/approvals/:id/edit-approve works with modified fields
Backend: GET /api/v1/action-items returns action items list (not 404)
Backend: POST /api/v1/schedule creates a new scheduled job
Backend: WebSocket at /api/v1/ws connects and responds to ping
Backend: WebSocket at /api/v1/ws returns sync_state data
Frontend: Live badge shows in topbar when WebSocket connected
Frontend: Connected indicator shows in sidebar
Frontend: Navigation between all views works (Overview, Approvals, Tasks, Inboxes, Calendar, Activity)
Frontend: Approval search bar filters results correctly
Frontend: Compose dialog opens with Templates, From, To, Subject, Message fields
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: Console warning about <span> inside <option> in ComposeDialog select - consider using plain text instead of dynamic spans in option elements
seed_data_creation: Created test tasks, action items, and schedule items during testing (prefixed with TEST_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All /api/v1/* endpoints tested and working. API migration complete - all endpoints now at /api/v1/ prefix. WebSocket at /api/v1/ws works. Old /api/ws returns 404. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_v1_api_migration.py covers all spec endpoints: approvals (CRUD + dismiss + edit-approve), action-items (alias for tasks with complete/defer/redirect), schedule (CRUD + pause/resume/run-now/edit), inboxes, activity, stats, brands, templates. AgentMail integration is real (not mocked).
